query:
-- Fix awayModelSpread / homeModelSpread for the 8 games that have NULL values
-- These must mirror awayRunLine/homeRunLine exactly so the GameCard renders correctly

UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '+1.5', homeModelSpread = '-1.5' WHERE id = 2250010;  -- MIN +1.5 / BAL -1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '-1.5', homeModelSpread = '+1.5' WHERE id = 2250011;  -- BOS -1.5 / CIN +1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '+1.5', homeModelSpread = '-1.5' WHERE id = 2250012;  -- LAA +1.5 / HOU -1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '-1.5', homeModelSpread = '+1.5' WHERE id = 2250013;  -- DET -1.5 / SD +1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '-1.5', homeModelSpread = '+1.5' WHERE id = 2250014;  -- TB -1.5 / STL +1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '+1.5', homeModelSpread = '-1.5' WHERE id = 2250015;  -- TEX +1.5 / PHI -1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '+1.5', homeModelSpread = '-1.5' WHERE id = 2252284;  -- ARI +1.5 / LAD -1.5
UPDATE games SET awayModelSpread = '+1.5', homeModelSpread = '-1.5' WHERE id = 2250016;  -- CLE +1.5 / SEA -1.5
